infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mr Antidot uses your camera to capture job verification photos and booking problem images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mr Antidot lets you attach photos from your library when booking a service.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mr Antidot uses your location to autofill your service address and to tag job verification photos so customers can confirm on-site work.

plugins.cameraPermission: Mr Antidot uses your camera to capture job verification photos and booking problem images.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Mr Antidot uses your location to autofill your service address and to tag job verification photos so customers can confirm on-site work.

plugins.photosPermission: Mr Antidot lets you attach photos from your library when booking a service.
plugins.cameraPermission: Mr Antidot uses your camera to capture photos for bookings and job verification.
